_README: TEMPLATE. Copy this file to appsettings.Development.json and fill in the values.
appsettings.Development.json is git-ignored, so your real values never leave your machine.
In CI and in the cloud this is not used at all: the value comes from the environment
variable ConnectionStrings__WeatherDb instead (the double underscore is how .NET maps
a flat environment variable onto a nested configuration key).
docker run --name weather-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=weather -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=weather -e POSTGRES_DB=weatherdb -p 5432:5432 -d postgres:17
